view.title: Idomeini {hostname}
view.name: Igama:
view.allGoodNoErrors: Konke kulungile! Awukho amaphutha kulwazi lokuxhumana!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuthumela kabusha i-imeyili yamukelekile?
view.welcomeEmailResent: I-imeyili yamukelekile ithunyelwe kabusha. Hlola ibhokisi lakho lokungena.

order.premiumAvailable: Yebo! Idomeini lakho {domain} litholakalayo futhi liyidomeini elikhethekile. Ukubhalisa ngokuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe. Thumela i-imeyili {email} uma ufuna ukuthenga leli domeini nge-{cost} ngonyaka.
order.premiumTaken: Uxolo! Idomeini lakho {domain} selithathiwe! Sewunazo? Ungalithuthukisa, futhi liyidomeini elikhethekile. Ukubhalisa ngokuzenzakalelayo kuvaliwe. Thumela i-imeyili {email} uma ufuna ukuthenga leli domeini nge-{cost} ngonyaka.
order.available: Yebo! Idomeini lakho {domain} litholakalayo! Ungalibhalisa nge-{cost}. Intengo yokuhlaziya izoba ngo-{renewal}.
order.taken: Uxolo! Idomeini lakho {domain} selithathiwe! Sewunazo? Ungalithuthukisa nge-{cost}. Intengo yokuhlaziya izoba ngo-{renewal}.
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: Isifundo-mhlathi sizohlaziywa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngemuva konyaka ngayinye nge-{cost} kuze kukhanshelwe.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: Ngokuhlola le bhokisi, uvuma ukuthi uthenga umkhiqizo wesifundo-mhlathi ohlaziywa ngokuzenzakalelayo (Njengoba Kuchaziwe Emigomweni Engenhla) futhi ubhilwa kwikhadi lekhredithi olinikeza namuhla. Uma ufuna ukukhansela ukuhlaziywa ngokuzenzakalelayo, ungafinyelela ku-portal yamakhasimende (Lapha) ukhethe inkonzo esebenzayo bese uchofoza isixhumanisi Sokukansela noma uthumele i-imeyili ku: billing{'@'}interserver.net. Ngokuhlola ibhokisi bese uchofoza Nika Umyalelo Wami ngezansi, nakhona uvuma ukuthi ufundile, uqonda, futhi uvuma Imigomo Nezimiso Kanye Nenqubomgomo Yobumfihlo.
order.searchingDomain: Sicela ulinde! Sikhangela leli gama ledomeini.
order.loadingDomainFields: Sicela ulinde! Iyalayisha izinkambu zamagama edomeini.

nameservers.title: Izeva Zamagama Edomeini
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Izeva zamagama esikhonzwe zisetshenzisiwe. Chofoza Buyekeza ukuze ugcine.

eppCode.title: Thumela Ikhodi ye-EPP nge-imeyili
eppCode.confirmMessage: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuthumela Ikhodi ye-EPP ku-imeyili ebhalisiwe?

whois.title: Ubumfihlo be-Whois
whois.renewalNote: Ubumfihlo be-Whois buhlaziywa njalo izinyanga ezingu-12 kusukela ngosuku lokusebenziswa. Intengo yokuhlaziya i-addon yokubumfihlo be-Whois ngu-{cost}.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Ubumfihlo Bokuxhumana bufihla ubunikazi be-Registrant uma umsebenzisi enza ukusesha kwe-WHOIS kulelo domeini le-Registrant.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: Inzuzo yokuba nobuFihlo Bokuxhumana ukuthi ubunikazi be-Registrant, kufaka ikheli lasekhaya, inombolo yocingo, ne-imeyili, kugcinwe ikude kubantumtumisa, abebe izinto zabantu, nabakhohlisi.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: Uma i-Registrant ivula inkonzo yobuFihlo Bokuxhumana, ulwazi lokuxhumana olufihliwe lubonakala kwidatabhesu ye-WHOIS yomphakathi.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Ubumfihlo Bokuxhumana butholakalayo nge-{cost} ngidomeini ngonyaka.
whois.enableNow: Ukuvula ubuFihlo Bokuxhumana kuDomeini Lakho, Nika Umyalelo Manje.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Intengo yobuFihlo be-Whois: {cost} ngonyaka. Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuphaka lona umyalelo?
whois.enableMessage: Idomeini lakho {hostname} line-addon yokubumfihlo be-whois ekhokhelwe engakavulwa okwamanje. Ingabe ufuna ukuyivula manje?
whois.disableMessage: I-addon yokubumfihlo be-Whois yedomeini lakho {hostname} ivuliwe okwamanje. Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuyivala futhi uyikhansele?

whoisToggle.title: I-addon Yokubumfihlo be-Whois
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: I-addon yokubumfihlo be-Whois yedomeini lakho {domain} ivuliwe
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: I-addon yokubumfihlo be-Whois yedomeini lakho {domain} ivalelwe
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna Ukuvala Nokukhanselwa kwayo?

lock.title: Ukuvala/Ukuvula Kwedomeini
lock.inactivateLock: Ingabe ufuna Ukususa ukusebenza kukavala kwedomeini?

dnssec.title: Ulwazi lwe-DNSSEC
dnssec.enterDigest: Faka Inani Lesifinyezo (Akufanele ibe ngaphezu kwabalingani abangu-{max})
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: Lokhu kuzosusa wonke amarekhodi we-DNSSEC alesidomeini.
dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Sicela ugcwalise okungenani irekhodi elilodwa le-DNSSEC.

renew.title: Hlaziya
renew.tip1: Idomeini kufanele lihlaziywe mhla wokuphela noma ngaphambi kwawo.
renew.tip2: Uma idomeini liphelelwe, kungaba khona isikhathi sokulinda kusukela usuku lokuphela ukuze lihlaziywe.
renew.tip3: Vula Ubumfihlo be-Whois ukuze ufihle Ulwazi Lwakho Lokuxhumana uma umsebenzisi enza ukusesha kwe-WHOIS kuledomeini le-Registrant.
renew.payExistingInvoice: Ukuhlaziya idomeini lakho, sicela ukhokhele ikheli elikhona.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Intengo ephelele: {cost}. Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuphaka lona umyalelo wokuhlaziya?
